particulars.description: F/H property k/a firstly part of kirklands gravel hill ludlow shropshire secondly part of lorelei gravel hill ludlow shropshire and thirdly part of 39 quarry gardens ludlow shropshire t/no's SL129759,SL168242 and SL176829.
